changedFactors.summary: The static fixture shape shows how a visible latency mutation could become decisive later.

unchangedFactors.summary: Only healthy candidates remain eligible in the fixture.
The request mutates one signal only; error rate remains unchanged.
Capacity remains unchanged so the fixture does not imply multi-factor retuning.

explanationSummary: Fixture-only result shape for a future one-signal what-if comparison. It does not execute replay, retune weights, call a live endpoint, or mutate real backends.
boundaries: Result is deterministic sample JSON only.
No production traffic replay is implemented.
No real backend mutation is implemented.
Unknown and unexposed signals remain explicit boundaries.
